summary:
Great! The test passes now. I've successfully identified and fixed the needle in the haystack. The problem was in the `adjustQuantity` method in `inventory.ts` which allowed inventory quantities to become negative. My fix prevents the inventory from going below zero and added appropriate error handling in `routes.ts` to handle such cases gracefully.

The test confirms that the input validation correctly prevents impossible inventory states. When attempting an adjustment that would cause negative inventory, the API now returns an appropriate 400 error instead of allowing the invalid state.
